title: Slick and Packed
description: A slick modpack with tons of quality of life features that is packed with features and optimisations - and is completely vanilla! Some mods (such as freelook) may not be allowed on specific servers, but most are allowed everywhere.
body: This is a slick modpack with tons of features to improve quality of life and boost frames, all whist being fully vanilla! There''s included some of my favourite resource packs and shaders, and tons of nice mods, some of which you may not have heard of! It should be legal for most servers too - some specific mods (such as Freelook) are banned on certain servers, so make sure to check server regulations beforehand - but for private SMPs this is great: no unfair advantages, just a polished experience.
